title: Mc122477Fix re updated
description: A simple mod that fixes writing a "t" into chat window, the random extra chat character on Unix-based systems like linux, macOS, ...
body:
![This will not happen again](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a1fa059a0320aab82bd9b3bab4eaf754a9eb84b.png)

This is a clone of the original [project](https://modrinth.com/mod/mc122477fix) to release for different mc fabric versions.

Should work on Linux and macOS.

Older versions are available on the original project [page](https://modrinth.com/mod/mc122477fix).

Fix double-typing 't' or '/' issue on some OSes when opening the chat window.

You do not need to install this mod if you didn't encounter this problem.

Client side only. Fabric required.

Mojang issue tracker https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-122477.
